title: Return to Sabaody
description: In the Return to Sabaody storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #2, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You should wear this... like so.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Uh-huh!! Thanks for all this, you guys!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What is it? I'm not marrying you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Well, then... I'll be off now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: An' if ya don't...that moment's blunder...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: But I'm in a hurry, so...
